items.summary: European equities rebounded on Tuesday as traders continue to watch developments in the Middle East.

items.headline: Volkswagen flags a tough year ahead as 2025 profit halves on tariffs, China competition
items.summary: Volkswagen reported a more than 50% drop in annual operating profit, citing the impact of U.S. tariffs, currency effects and a strategic shift at Porsche.

items.headline: Stellantis taps Toyota, Bosch suppliers for hybrid technologies for new Jeeps
items.summary: Jeep maker Stellantis is leaning on technologies from automotive suppliers for its newest hybrid vehicles, CNBC has learned.

items.headline: Kevin Mandia sold his cybersecurity company to Google in 2022. He has a fresh $190 million for a new venture
items.summary: Mandiant founder Kevin Mandia is staying in cybersecurity after selling his prior company to Google, but now he's focused on AI.

items.headline: Iran defends strikes on Gulf neighbors. They say a 'huge trust gap' will last for decades
items.summary: Iran has defended its strikes against its Gulf countries but its neighbors say attacks have damaged trust for a long time.

items.headline: China’s nudge, U.S. waiver and Iran tensions test India’s economic balancing act
items.summary: India is trying to preserve its long-standing neutral foreign policy as escalating tensions around Iran threaten its oil supply and expose New Delhi to pressure from both Washington and Beijing.

items.headline: As the Iran war upends energy flows, Russia is emerging as the real winner
items.summary: Russia is shaping up to be a major beneficiary of the escalating energy crisis in the Persian Gulf, analysts told CNBC.

items.headline: The Iran war has put the brakes on the next Bank of England rate cut
items.summary: Before the war in Iran erupted, the Bank of England was widely predicted to be set to cut interest rates in March or April. Don't count on it, economists say.

items.headline: Oil extends slide as investors assess Trump comments on Iran war, Strait of Hormuz
items.summary: Oil prices plunged after Trump warned that Tehran would be hit "twenty times harder" if it attempted to halt oil flows through the Strait of Hormuz.

items.headline: Iran war threatens catastrophic consequences for the oil market, Aramco CEO says
items.summary: Saudi Aramco beats profit estimates and keeps $85 billion payouts as oil prices surge again.

items.headline: Lego keeps beating the toy industry. Its secret weapon is not what you'd expect
items.summary: Lego on Tuesday reported a 12% jump in revenue for fiscal year 2025 and reported consumer sales that far outpace the broader toy industry.

items.headline: CNBC Daily Open: Markets recover as Trump hints Iran war is nearing its end
items.summary: U.S. key benchmarks closed in the green after Trump signaled a near end to the Iran war.

items.headline: Nvidia plans open-source AI agent platform ‘NemoClaw’ for enterprises: Wired
items.summary: Nvidia is planning to lean into the agentic AI craze and launch an open-source platform for AI agents called 'NemoClaw,' according to a report.

items.headline: South Korea opposed to U.S. moving air defense systems in the country to Middle East: President Lee
items.summary: Lee maintained that even if the assets were moved out of the country, its deterrence capability against North Korea will not be affected.

items.headline: Asia markets rebound as oil plunges after Trump signals Iran war might end 'soon'

items.headline: Oil tankers transiting Strait of Hormuz 'must be very careful,' Iran Foreign Ministry warns

items.headline: Anthropic sues Trump administration over Pentagon blacklist
items.summary: The lawsuit says Anthropic is being harmed "irreparably" and could lose hundreds of millions of dollars.

items.headline: China exports sharply beat expectations as trade surplus in the first two months surges to highest on record
items.summary: China typically combines January and February trade data to smooth distortions from the shifting Lunar New Year holiday.

items.headline: Elon Musk's xAI wants to build a power plant in Mississippi. Regulators plan a key meeting on Election Day
items.summary: The NAACP has accused Mississippi regulators of rushing a meeting to approve xAI plans for a massive, methane-burning power plant in Southaven.

items.headline: Trump says Iran war will end 'very soon,' predicts lower oil prices

items.headline: Democrats threaten more Iran war powers votes, call for Hegseth, Rubio to testify

items.headline: Top permitting-reform Republican, Democratic senators meeting as talks thaw: API chief

items.headline: Warsh to meet Tillis as Senate confirmation remains blocked

items.headline: Jim Cramer says don't make any sudden stocks moves on Trump-fueled rally
items.summary: CNBC's Jim Cramer said the stock market isn't in the clear yet despite President Trump's remarks that the war with Iran may be nearing an end.

items.headline: Million-dollar earners have already stopped paying into Social Security for 2026
items.summary: The Social Security payroll tax is capped at $184,500 in 2026. Some high earners have already stopped paying into the program for the year.

items.headline: There's another big reason why shipping companies and insurers aren't willing to risk the Strait of Hormuz
items.summary: An environmental catastrophe poses a massive risk in a region that has glittering high-rise buildings, posh beachfront resorts and booming commercial centers.

items.headline: Anthropic was the Pentagon's choice for AI. Now it's banned and experts are worried

items.headline: Seventh U.S. service member killed in Iran war identified as Sgt. Benjamin Pennington
items.summary: Pennington, 26, from Glendale, Kentucky, was wounded on March 1 during an Iranian strike at Prince Sultan Air Base in Saudi Arabia. He died on Sunday.

items.headline: OpenAI to buy cybersecurity startup Promptfoo to better safeguard AI agents
items.summary: Promptfoo's team will join Sam Altman-led OpenAI, and its technology will be integrated into the Frontier platform for AI agents.

items.headline: FBI obtains records of Arizona Senate audit of 2020 Maricopa County election results, Republican says
items.summary: President Donald Trump touted the fact that the records had been obtained by the FBI. He long has claimed he was cheated out of victory in the 2020 election.

items.headline: Oracle is building yesterday’s data centers with tomorrow’s debt

items.headline: There's another energy market that may get hit harder than oil by Strait of Hormuz closure

items.headline: Fears of 1970s-style stagflation arise with oil spike to $100. How big a threat is it?

items.headline: Amazon's Zoox expands robotaxi testing to Phoenix and Dallas
items.summary: Zoox will start by deploying a fleet of retrofitted Toyota Highlander SUVs, before rolling out its toaster-shaped robotaxis for testing.
